sites.name: Massena Hydro Campus
sites.interconnection_queue_status: NYISO: Class Year study cycle, longer queue
sites.incentive_notes: NY §1115(a)(37) internet-data-center sales-tax exemption currently applies but faces proposed repeal (S9288, Feb 2026), so treat it as under legislative review.
sites.data_note: Adjacent to NYPA St. Lawrence-FDR hydro and former Alcoa works; cheap firm hydro power, cold climate.
